questions.questionText: Who is known as the "Father of the Nation" for unifying modern Nepal?

Which dynasty ruled Nepal before the Shah dynasty?
In which century was Gautam Buddha born in Lumbini?
What was the name of the 10-year conflict that ended with the Comprehensive Peace Accord in 2006?
Who was the last King of Nepal?
Who is remembered as the famous commander of Nalapani fort during the Anglo-Nepal War?
The "Kot Massacre" of 1846 led to the rise of which political dynasty?
Who was the first President of the United States?
In which year did World War II end?
Which ancient civilization built the Great Pyramids of Giza?
Who was the French female leader who led the army at the Siege of Orléans and was later canonized as a saint?
What was the Renaissance?
options: A period of rebirth in European art, culture, and science

questions.questionText: Which empire was ruled by Julius Caesar and Augustus?
Who was the leader of the Indian Independence Movement known for non-violent resistance?
In 1969, which event marked a "giant leap for mankind"?
options: The building of the Berlin Wall

questions.questionText: What was the name of the wall that divided East and West Berlin until 1989?
Who discovered the sea route from Europe to India via the Cape of Good Hope in 1498?
